name: refactor-project
title: P1 framework refactor: native architecture convergence
description: High-priority framework refactor workstream: split native v1 backend by bounded context, stabilize infra/repository contracts, extract frontend features from product compatibility code, and make current core deletable after parity.
scope: P1 framework architecture refactor plus destructive parity migration and current-core deletion readiness
creator: lijin
notes: Baseline committed as aba33f3. Native v1 memory-atoms committed as 52c215b; owner-config endpoints committed as dfd596b; package/import/visitor/gameplay utility endpoints committed as 968ee65; checkpoint docs committed as 4c70ba5. Current runtime migration slice adds native v1 LLM probe, group-chat config/send/history/talkativeness, voice config, TTS/STT endpoints; adds domain/group_chat_policy.py, contracts/application/routes, frontend typed clients including readApiBlob, backend/tests/test_v1_runtime_features.py, and backend spec/task notes. This slice keeps using reusable product-core domain modules but does not delegate to core/web/service.py or core/web/router.py. Validation passed for current slice: focused runtime test 2 passed, backend/tests 27 passed, full pytest 256 passed, frontend typecheck/build/test passed, git diff --check passed with PRD LF→CRLF warning only. Native v1 character-assets slice adds expression catalog/inference, character sprite map read/write, standalone SillyTavern character-card parse/export, domain/expression_policy.py, frontend typed clients, backend/tests/test_v1_character_assets.py, and backend spec/task notes. Validation passed: py_compile for changed Python files; isolated clean-worktree compileall, focused character-assets test (2 passed), backend/tests (29 passed), full pytest (258 passed, with existing frontend/dist copied for the legacy static-shell test); frontend typecheck/build/test; git diff --cached --check. Unrelated MySQL WIP and deleted reference PNGs remain unstaged. Native v1 global WorldInfo slice adds /api/v1/worldinfo CRUD/test routes, WorldInfoWriteRequest/WorldInfoGlobalTestRequest, TavernApplicationService methods backed by Tavern.world_info/WorldInfoEntry, frontend typed clients, backend/tests/test_v1_world_info_global.py, and spec/task notes. Validation passed: py_compile for changed Python files; isolated clean-worktree compileall, focused WorldInfo global test (2 passed), backend/tests (31 passed), full pytest (260 passed, with existing frontend/dist copied for the legacy static-shell test); frontend typecheck/build/test; git diff --cached --check. Unrelated MySQL WIP and deleted reference PNGs remain unstaged. Native v1 tokenizer/memory utility slice adds /api/v1/tokenizers list/count/count_messages and /api/v1/memory summarize/truncate/importance routes, Token*/Memory* request contracts, TavernApplicationService methods backed by core.token_counter/core.memory without delegating to core/web, frontend typed clients, backend/tests/test_v1_memory_tokenizer_utilities.py, and backend spec/task notes. Validation passed: py_compile for changed Python files; isolated clean-worktree compileall, focused tokenizer/memory utility test (2 passed), backend/tests (33 passed), full pytest (262 passed, with existing frontend/dist copied for the legacy static-shell test); frontend typecheck/build/test. Unrelated MySQL WIP and deleted reference PNGs remain unstaged. Full project design baseline added in full-project-design.md: records target front-back separated architecture, bounded contexts, /api/v1 canonical strategy, repository/MySQL direction, compatibility core deletion checklists, phased roadmap, and validation matrix. Design-only change; no runtime code changed. Framework refactor priority raised to P1 on 2026-04-22: treat native architecture convergence, backend route/application splitting, frontend feature extraction, infra/repository stability, and current-core deletion readiness as the next highest-priority workstream before new product scope. Added P1 child task 04-22-sillytavern-copy-migration: audit all sillytavern_copy implementations, migrate/adapt required capabilities into native framework, record non-migrated reasons, and delete sillytavern_copy after parity.

framework_refactor.primary_goal: Make the target native architecture the main implementation path before adding more product scope.
first_slices: backend native v1 route split by bounded context
application service split by use case
compatibility route inventory and deletion gates
